industry_evidence: Name indicates law firm or legal services (match: 'Law')
compliance_rationale: Law firms handle attorney-client privileged data. ABA Model Rule 1.6(c) requires reasonable efforts to prevent unauthorized disclosure. California CCPA applies to firms that collect California residents' personal data above thresholds. Many corporate clients now require SOC 2 attestation from their outside counsel.
_note: Tech can edit this file; the classifier won't overwrite it on re-runs unless --overwrite is passed.
